tasks.criterion: Audit-log committed and tracked: git ls-files --error-unmatch .council/audit-log.jsonl exits 0 AND git log --oneline -1 -- .council/audit-log.jsonl contains sprint-14 (case-insensitive). PASS when both hold.
Both stale worktree gitlinks removed: git ls-files .claude/worktrees/focused-hofstadter-3b9fb5 .claude/worktrees/jolly-perlman-094dc3 | wc -l returns 0.
No stale worktree gitlinks remain tracked: git ls-files .claude/worktrees | wc -l returns 0.

Working tree carries no uncommitted non-session content at completion (graded post-Step-5-commit): git status --porcelain | grep -vE settings.local.json|progress.md|sprint-state.json|audit-log.jsonl | wc -l returns 0.
Push readiness: git rev-list --count origin/meta-eval/self-upgrade..HEAD >= 1 and upstream is set. Grades readiness; push is the human-gate.
Should NOT rewrite/truncate audit-log (append-only): post-commit line count >= pre-sprint working-copy (2347).
Should NOT modify prior sprint contracts/evals/decisions/henkaten; JIT regression gate intact.
tasks.verification_command: grep -c '<!-- Context scope at this step:' plugins/trine-eval/skills/harness-kickoff/SKILL.md

tasks.criterion: Should NOT force-push or push to a branch other than meta-eval/self-upgrade (plain git push only).
Should NOT alter config core fields.
